assumptions.detail: analysis.json was not present; used stack decisions from CLAUDE.md: framework=next, hosting=cloud-run, auth=firebase-auth, database=firestore, stripe=required
React Native (PRD specified) → mobile-first responsive Next.js web app, as noted in CLAUDE.md unsupported list
PostgreSQL (PRD specified) → Firebase Firestore, as noted in CLAUDE.md unsupported list

LLM AI coaching (PRD specified) → rule-based progressive overload logic: weight increase suggestions after 3 consecutive top-rep sessions, deload suggestion after 6+ consecutive days, return motivation after 3+ missed days
Audio snippets (PRD specified) → text-based Arnold motivational quotes displayed in UI, as noted in CLAUDE.md unsupported list
Social/leaderboard features → Phase 2, skipped per CLAUDE.md
Stripe integration implemented with placeholder test keys; STRIPE_SECRET_KEY and STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET must be set in production environment for payments to work
Pump Score calculated as rule-based metric: percentage of target volume achieved (sets completed × reps × weight vs target), scaled 0-100

User level XP system: each completed workout awards 100 base points + bonus for pump score. Levels: Beginner (0-500), Novice (500-1500), Intermediate (1500-3000), Advanced (3000-5000), Elite (5000-10000), Elite Bodybuilder (10000+)
Plan assignment during onboarding: beginner experience level → Beginner plan (reduced volume), intermediate → Classic Arnold (high volume), advanced → Advanced plan (2-a-day volume)
Workout day cycling is 3-day repeat: Day 1 (Chest+Back) → Day 2 (Shoulders+Arms) → Day 3 (Legs) → repeat. Next day determined by last completed session day number.
Firestore named database 'iron-mind-2' used throughout. All getFirestore() calls pass the database name as second argument to avoid hitting default database.
Badges implemented: Iron Starter (first workout), Chest Destroyer (10 chest sessions), Leg Day Hero (10 leg sessions), Volume King (1M total volume), Streak Master (7-day streak)
